# Purpose
This code is a C++ header file that provides a single function, [`vibe_score_info_is_valid`](<#vibe_score_info_is_valid>), which checks the validity of a `VibeScoreId`. The function takes a `VibeScoreId` as an argument and always returns `true`, indicating that the ID is considered valid under all conditions. The header file includes another header, `vibe_score_info.h`, which suggests that it relies on definitions or declarations from that file. The functionality is narrow, focusing solely on the validation of `VibeScoreId` objects.
